title: Ichiko Aoba – Live at Symphony Hall
location: Symphony Hall Atlanta, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Japanese singer-songwriter Iké Aoba performs her ethereal, atmospheric folk at Symphony Hall. A deeply romantic, cinematic experience — couples who love atmospheric music and elegant venues will find this unforgettable.

title: Jazz On The Rooftop – Tuesdays at Virtue
location: Virtue Rooftop (above 5Church Midtown), 84 5th St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly jazz night on one of Atlanta's most scenic rooftops. Start with dinner at 5Church below, then head up for jazz with skyline views. Great energy with saxophonist Loyd Watson Jr. Weather-dependent.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's best weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. All skill levels welcome — beginners grab a lesson early, then dance the night away. Great couples activity with an energetic crowd and fun late-night vibe.

title: Matt O'Brien – Live at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Comedy standout Matt O'Brien (America's Got Talent, Conan, Comedy Central) brings his set to Helium. Intimate club, great sightlines, food and drinks. Perfect for a funny, low-key date night.

title: Scott Pilgrim vs. The World Drag Dinner
location: Lore Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Epic drag show inspired by Scott Pilgrim. Dinner, drinks, and incredible performances — a super fun, memorable date night. Great energy, hilarious hosts, perfect for couples who love quirky entertainment.

title: Rickey Smiley – Special Event at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: TV personality and beloved comedian Rickey Smiley brings his stand-up to Atlanta. Helium is the city's top comedy club — intimate setting, great sightlines, solid food and drinks.

title: Latin Fridays at Sanctuary Nightclub
location: Sanctuary Nightclub, 96 5th St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's premier Friday night Latin dance party. Salsa, bachata, merengue, reggaeton, and Latin pop on multiple floors. Full bar, great crowd — perfect for couples who want to dance the night away.

title: 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest – Day 1
location: Auburn Avenue, Downtown Atlanta, GA
description: One of Atlanta's largest free outdoor festivals celebrating Black culture, music, food, and community. Live music, food vendors, art exhibits, and family-friendly activities. Great for couples who want a vibrant free day out.

title: Lila Iké Live at The Masquerade
location: The Masquerade (The Loft), 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Jamaican reggae star Lila Iké brings her captivating voice to The Loft. Intimate venue with great acoustics and cocktails — no arena crowds, just pure music in a cool space. Perfect for reggae-loving couples.

title: Bruce Bruce Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 987 Memorial Dr SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Legendary comedian Bruce Bruce delivers his high-energy stand-up at City Winery. Wine, laughs, and an intimate date night atmosphere. Shows fill up fast — book early.

title: Sandy Springs Farmers Market
location: Sandy Springs Farmers Market, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly Saturday farmers market with local produce, artisan goods, and food vendors. Great relaxed morning date — grab coffee, walk around, and pick up fresh goods together.

title: 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest – Day 2
location: Auburn Avenue, Downtown Atlanta, GA
description: Second day of Atlanta's signature community festival. More live music, food, and cultural celebrations. Pack a blanket, grab food from vendors, and enjoy the vibes. One of the best free events in Atlanta.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's best weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. All skill levels welcome — beginners grab a lesson early, then dance the night away. Great couples activity with an energetic crowd and fun late-night vibe.

title: Martin Amini – Special Event at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Stand-up comedian Martin Amini brings his unique voice to Helium. Great date night — intimate club, good food and drinks, and non-stop laughs. One of Atlanta's best comedy venues.

title: Slow Drag – Audio Gumbo Monthly Dance Party
location: Atlanta (check audio-gumbo.com for venue)
description: Monthly dance party celebrating Black intimacy and culture through 70s slow jams. A romantic, unique dance experience you won't find anywhere else in the city. Perfect for couples who want something different.

title: ECHOES Exhibition – Kai Lin Art (Final Days)
time: Exhibition ends May 15; check kailinart.com for hours
location: Kai Lin Art, 92 Georgia Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30312
description: Final days of ECHOES, a group exhibition exploring themes of return and interruption. Opening night was May 1 with a mixer on May 9. Perfect cultural date — wander through galleries together and grab coffee nearby.

title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color – Jackson Fine Art
location: Jackson Fine Art, 3115 Piedmont Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: Acclaimed exhibition of Gordon Parks' color photography capturing the American South. A powerful, moving show — couples who appreciate photography and history will find this deeply resonant.

title: Druid Hills Farmers Market
location: Druid Hills Farmers Market, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly Saturday morning farmers market in the beautiful Druid Hills neighborhood. Local produce, plants, artisan foods, and live music. Great relaxed date for couples who love good food and neighborhood vibes.

title: AfroVibez 2026 – 5th Annual Africa Day Celebration at MOWA
location: MOWA (Museum of West African Art), Atlanta, GA
description: 5th Annual Africa Day Celebration featuring African music, art, food, and culture. Live performances, vendors, and community celebration. Great cultural date for couples interested in African heritage and diaspora arts.

title: AfroPianoWednesdays ATL – DJ Shine D'Beast
location: TerangaCity, Atlanta, GA
description: Afrobeat and piano-infused DJ night featuring DJ Shine D'Beast. One of Atlanta's best recurring Afrobeat parties. Great energy, full bar, and a fun, lively crowd. Perfect for couples who love to dance.
